notes: The log file that ships ON the cartridge · authored content presented as accumulated saves. The A.G. 1979 entry is injected at read time only when glass_second_ledger_seen is held (the ferry clerk stood one watch). Player entries append below, undated.

entries.text: first watch. dad says just walk it and write it.
heard it. three. not writing what.
padlock stiff. oiled it. someone should fix the gutter.
light on the island again. tried to log it under condition. machine says NOT A STATION. fine. keeping it here in words then: there is a light.
checked twice. i know i checked twice because i wrote it once and didn't believe myself.
taking the watch this summer. someone has to. — W.A.
three sounds. right on time. you get used to it. you should not get used to it.
came back to stand one more before i finish the build. the game will not confirm anything. that is the design. that was always the design.
door was open. bed made. logged it. filing NAMES blank because the field is blank because the field is always blank
stood the watch tonight so the regular man could take the envelope run. fair is fair. the water was quiet. the ledger balances. — A.G.
